commands.addrole: Gives a role to a member, by mention or ID (restricted like nuke: owners + those allowed via +nukeadd)
commands.afk: Marks you as away (AFK) — removed automatically when you come back
commands.alertconfig: Configure alerts: in-channel ping (@everyone/@here/role/none) and your DM alerts per server
commands.alertesnipe: Live security alert center (history, channel, role, repeat delay) — refreshes itself (owner)
commands.announce: Schedules an announcement in the channel after a delay
commands.antibot: Antibot: strict (on), smart (checks name+ID) or off, + removes unknown bots
commands.autorole: Automatically gives a role to new members
commands.autoslowmode: Enables slowmode automatically during a message spike (removed when calm)
commands.avatar: Shows a member's avatar (mention or ID)
commands.backup: Backs up the server (roles, channels, settings) or only roles + channels, and restores after a nuke
commands.ban: Bans a member from the server (mention or ID, even off-server)
commands.base: Panel of enabled protections, live. `+base channel` creates a permanent dedicated channel (owner)
commands.bl: Blacklists a member: they can no longer receive any role and are auto-banned as soon as they (re)join
commands.bot: Full bot dashboard (connection, security, monitoring, activity, code, system)
commands.bug: Report a bug to the staff (panel with categories + free report)
commands.case: Shows the details of a moderation case by its number
commands.changelogdm: Enables or disables receiving the bot changelog in DM
commands.close: Closes the current ticket and archives the transcript in the logs
commands.config: Shows the server's full current configuration
commands.customperm: Sets the required tier of a command (or via +setup → Per-command permissions)
commands.daily: Daily XP reward (growing bonus on consecutive days)
commands.delrole: Removes a role from a member, by mention or ID (restricted like addrole: owners + allowed via +nukeadd)
commands.devine: Guess the mystery number (the bot tells you higher / lower)
commands.dm: Sends a private message to a member (mention or ID)
commands.embed: Creates a custom embed (title | description | image, supports {var:name})
commands.errorlog: Sets the channel where the bot's errors are posted (owner)
commands.exportconfig: Shows this server's ID to clone its settings to another
commands.gameleaderboard: Game wins leaderboard (quiz, lotto, guess, fun poll)
commands.gay: The gay-meter: measures a member's gayness rate (for laughs)
commands.giveaway: Starts a giveaway (possible conditions: role, level)
commands.help: Shows the paginated help menu, or the details of a command
commands.importconfig: Clones another server's settings to this one (owner)
commands.indice: Full ID card of a member (moderation + security + local & durable danger index)
commands.invite: Shows the link to add the bot to a server (embed + button)
commands.invites: Shows a member's invites (or the leaderboard)
commands.joincreate: "Hub" voice channel: joining it creates a personal temporary voice channel (Join-to-Create)
commands.kick: Kicks a member from the server
commands.level: Shows your level and XP (or another member's)
commands.levelrole: Level rewards: automatically grants a role at a tier
commands.linkwl: Domain whitelist for antilink (links allowed despite antilink)
commands.lockdown: Panic mode: locks or unlocks all text channels
commands.loto: Lotto: take a ticket, the closest to the draw wins a big XP boost!
commands.massrole: Adds (or removes) a role to all human members of the server
commands.menu: Opens the bot configuration panel (alias of +setup)
commands.moveall: Moves all members in voice — or a specific member (mention/ID) — to a voice channel
commands.note: Private moderation notes on a member (staff only)
commands.nuke: Clears a channel by deleting then recreating it identically. `+nuke lock` protects a channel
commands.nukeadd: Allows a member to use the nuke command (or removes them)
commands.offbackup: Sends an encrypted backup in DM (off-server), or manages the weekly auto-send
commands.owner: Manages the bot owners (all permissions over the bot)
commands.perm: Permission tiers: assigns a role to an access level (mod/admin/owner)
commands.prefix: Changes the bot prefix on this server
commands.punish: Configures automatic sanctions based on the number of infractions (strikes)
commands.purge: Deletes the recent messages of a specific member (this channel, or all with "all")
commands.quarantine: Lists quarantined members and lets you release or ban them
commands.quizz: Multiplayer quiz: 10 questions, the most correct answers wins an XP boost (rotating theme)
commands.raid: Gag: fake "raid" loading bar followed by a surprise gif
commands.reason: Edits the reason of an existing moderation case
commands.remind: Schedules a reminder (DM/channel) after a delay
commands.reset: Resets the bot's entire configuration on this server (double owner confirmation)
commands.rolemenu: Creates a button role menu (members assign roles themselves)
commands.sanctions: Shows or manages a member's warnings (mention or ID)
commands.say: Makes the bot speak in the channel (supports {var:name})
commands.scan: Scans the server, flags dangerous configurations and offers to fix them
commands.setlogs: Sets (or removes) the server's logs channel
commands.setstats: Creates configurable counter channels (members, humans, bots, boosts, roles, channels)
commands.setup: Opens the bot configuration panel (prefix, theme, logs, security, scan)
commands.ship: Calculates the love compatibility rate between two members
commands.snipe: Shows the channel's last deleted message, with navigation (◀ ▶) and deleted/edited toggle
commands.sondagefun: Poll game: vote a theme, then 5 rounds of "vote like the majority" with a leaderboard
commands.starboard: "Best-of" channel: messages with enough ⭐ get pinned there
commands.statut: Changes the bot's status (presence + activity), or resets it
commands.sticky: Pins a "floating" message that re-posts at the bottom of the channel
commands.tempban: Temporarily bans a member (auto-unban on expiry)
commands.tempsmute: Mutes a member (text + voice) for a given duration
commands.theme: Changes the bot's embed color (help menu, etc.)
commands.tupref: Starts a "Would you rather…?" (random, or custom: +tupref X or Y) with live votes 🅰️/🅱️
commands.unbl: Removes a member from the blacklist: they can receive roles again and are no longer banned on join
commands.unmute: Gives a member their voice back (removes text and voice mute)
commands.unowner: Removes a bot owner (mention or ID)
commands.unwl: Removes a member from the antiraid whitelist
commands.update: Checks for dependency updates, APPLIES them (npm install) and restarts the bot (owner)
commands.vc: Shows the active voice channels and their member count
commands.vcgift: Voice gift: random draw among members in voice (instant, timed or auto)
commands.voicexp: Enables/disables voice XP gain (5–9 XP/min, built-in anti-farm)
commands.warn: Gives a warning to a member (automatic sanction based on the tiers)
commands.warnexpiry: Sets the automatic expiry of warnings (in days)
commands.wl: Whitelist: protects a trusted member (never sanctioned by antiraid)
